programme.title: Fashion Destination: Thailand
programme.desc: Discover Thailand, the Land of Smiles, tropical beaches, ancient ruins and modern buzzing cities! Enjoy its picture-postcard landscapes, mouth-watering delicacies and a genuinely warm Thai welcome.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: This week we have another go at our new series memory verse, 'The D.I.Y Guys' are back with some yummy treats, we play some fun games & Harry is bringing the word!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner - his mum!

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists share the vision of expressing their faith through music.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Donut holes and chili bowls are the star of the show when Mike takes a trip to the nation's capital; Mike talks about DC's secret passageways and ends up finding some of his own in a spooky mansion.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: We all have plans for our relationships and work to keep things on the right path. Sometimes, chronic illness or pain gets in the way.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden: Real Murders
programme.desc: Aurora finds a group member killed in a way that resembles the crime the club was about to discuss. As other 'copycat' killings follow, Aurora will have to uncover the person behind the game.

programme.title: Hometown Remedy
programme.desc: A busy surgeon heads back home to celebrate her father becoming mayor. But after a chance encounter with the town's only doctor-and most eligible bachelor-she witnesses true compassion.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.sub-title: Why do we not Follow the laws in the Bible?
programme.desc: The shows are recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with skeptical students and professors, to give real answers to the tough questions about Christianity.

programme.title: Summer in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Frankie and Nate are gearing up for the town's largest event. When an issue with the new wine puts things in jeopardy, the relationship and the partnership will be put to test.

programme.title: Valentine in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Frankie & Nate have just gotten engaged when Frankie's cousin & Nate's brother tell them that they're getting married on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Betrayal can wreck the lives of both the betrayer and the betrayed. The envy of Joseph's brothers led them to do horrible things, but God was at work in the life of Joseph.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Unveiled
programme.desc: Emma travels to Italy to teach and research a wedding veil said to bring its owner love. While there, she meets Paolo, the son of a local lace-making family.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Marriages should be built on the foundations taught in the Bible. Matthew 19. (San Antonio 1970.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Legacy
programme.desc: This is the third instalment of the enchanting trilogy about three college friends - Tracy, Avery and Emma - who share a 19th century wedding veil said to bring whoever possesses it true love.

programme.title: Show Me The Father
programme.desc: An inspiring documentary which demonstrates through dozens of interviews with key influential figures just how vital the role of the father is for families as well as society as a whole.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.sub-title: The Holy Spirit Your Best Friend
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.sub-title: The World Outside Your Window Pt-3
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, life-changing, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus in a practical way.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: You need to know that you are on this earth with a purpose. God has called you to build His Kingdom. In today's episode be inspiried by the Holy spirit to get back on track with your calling in Life.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: With his respected position in Potiphar's house Joseph could have given in to temptation, but because he stayed true to his convictions and loyal to God, he was able to achieve victory over temptation.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Will of God in Your Life/The Courage to Face Life's Trials
programme.desc: Tackling important issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: After a near-fatal house fire, Natalie and Loughlin, a struggling married couple, are manipulated by an obsessive firefighter named Jack, who schemes to pit the couple against each other.

programme.title: The Killing Game
programme.desc: Ten years after her daughter's murder, Eve is contacted by a man claiming to be the child's killer, who taunts her with mysterious clues and threats to kill again.

programme.title: She Went Missing
programme.desc: A reporter's long-dormant stalker re-emerges when she returns to her hometown to investigative the disappearance of her childhood best friend.

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. However, one of her friends starts to suspect that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Lies Between Friends
programme.desc: A wealthy family's world is turned upside down when the 18-year-old daughter of a family friend moves in with them for a few months.

programme.title: Am I A Serial Killer?
programme.desc: A teenage girl visits her mum on death row and gets lured into a dangerous trap to take the fall for her mother's crimes.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Date at Your Own Risk
programme.desc: Eva becomes horrified when she reads an online post where other women accuse her ex-fiance of harassment and aggressive behaviour.

programme.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programme.desc: A lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger who's smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasn't the only secret he failed to mention.

programme.title: Wrath: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Single lawyer Chastity Jeffries believes she's found her perfect match in Xavier Collins, but his obsessive love forces her to confront how far she's strayed from her own principles.

programme.title: Wedding Planner Mystery
programme.desc: A wedding planner turns amateur sleuth when she investigates a suspicious death and the kidnapping of a bride.

programme.title: The Boarding School Murders
programme.desc: Foster teen Frankie attends an elite Swiss boarding school. One of her classmates is murdered and everyone is quick to blame Frankie. She must prove innocence before becoming a prime suspect.

programme.title: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Cheryl's daughter goes missing and is nowhere to be found. Authorities and the media dismiss her as a runaway while they focus on another missing girl, who is white.

programme.title: Buried in Barstow
programme.desc: Hazel King is a single mother determined to protect her daughter from the life she once had while defending and protecting those who can't protect themselves.

programme.title: My Child has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that his biological father is actually her fertility doctor, she teams up with another one of the doctor's clients to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Spinning Out Of Control
programme.desc: Infatuated and obsessed with a fitness instructor, Natalie hatches a devious plan to eliminate everyone in the young woman's life so she can have her all to herself.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Every time Jesus performed a miracle, He revealed the Father's goodness to us!

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: How to Redeem Your Family Name Series Part 2
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you struggle with anger or strife? Today, Joyce shares how to let go of anger and how to foster unity, replacing offense with God's love and peace.

programme.title: 5000 Blankets
programme.desc: When her husband has a mental breakdown and goes missing, a woman and her young son set out to find him on the streets, sparking a movement of compassion towards those in need and inspiring a city.

programme.title: Summer in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Frankie and Nate are gearing up for the town's largest event. When an issue with the new wine puts things in jeopardy, the relationship and the partnership will be put to test.

programme.title: Valentine in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Frankie & Nate have just gotten engaged when Frankie's cousin & Nate's brother tell them that they're getting married on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: The Mercy Ship
programme.desc: Follow seven medical professionals from Northern Ireland travelling to Madagascar to volunteer on the floating hospital ship the Africa Mercy, a converted luxury cruise ship.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Transformation Begins with the Call to Conversion (1)
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Testament: The Parables Retold
programme.desc: Luke hides from the Temple Guard with the early disciples, hoping to further his research on Jesus. But he gets more than he bargained for when he hears the storyteller's own stories; the parables.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd Part 2
programme.desc: In part two of The Lord Is My Shepherd, Pastor Bayless looks at the peace and restoration Jesus promises His sheep.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are anger and strife affecting your life? Today, Joyce shares on the importance of letting go of offence and embracing a life filled with peace.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Testament: The Parables Retold
programme.desc: Luke hides from the Temple Guard with the early disciples, hoping to further his research on Jesus. But he gets more than he bargained for when he hears the storyteller's own stories; the parables.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: Teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: Faith, Hope & Love
programme.desc: Recent divorcee Faith enters a dance contest to save her dance studio, where she meets Jimmy Hope and rediscovers her faith and dreams.

programme.title: In God's Company: Thomas Cook
programme.desc: There is no name in the world more instantly recognisable in connection with travel than Thomas Cook. His great passion was to make "God's earth with all its fullness and beauty" accessible and affordable to all.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Out By Faith And Win Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner - his mum!

programme.title: Spinning Out Of Control
programme.desc: Infatuated and obsessed with a fitness instructor, Natalie hatches a devious plan to eliminate everyone in the young woman's life so she can have her all to herself.

programme.title: Single Black Female
programme.desc: Monica is a young host of one of LA's top morning shows. Reeling from the death of her beloved father and a recent breakup, she's ready to focus on moving forward with her life.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: A woman moves to a new town and opens her own gourmet restaurant after escaping from an abusive relationship. However, she soon finds herself in a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Trapped in the Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: Lured into an unwelcome reunion at a vacant ski lodge, former college friends find themselves in a fight for their lives when they become the target of an unseen adversary.

programme.title: Hider in My House
programme.desc: As Molly Bachman settles into the apartment of her dreams, she discovers a hidden entrance to another apartment within the walls.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A reporter who witnesses a brutal murder becomes entangled in a mystery involving conjoined twins who were separated at birth.

programme.title: Stalked by My Amish Boyfriend
programme.desc: Carly develops a relationship with Abram, a young Amish man. Their seemingly innocent courtship soon takes a dark turn when Abram refuses to return home.

programme.title: An Amish Sin
programme.desc: An Amish teenager tries to escape the harsh lifestyle in the 18th century where she grew up to find her own voice and independence.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets By the Lake
programme.desc: A woman returns home to prove her sister is innocent of murder. She is met by a forbidden love, dark secrets, and a family rivalry fueled by the disappearance of a childhood friend.

programme.title: Couples Retreat Murder
programme.desc: Becky and Jim head to a remote couple's retreat to try and save their marriage. However, when a guest goes missing and their host is found dead, they start to wonder who else they're trapped with.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: When best-selling mystery author Mallory Dearborn decides to end her long-running detective franchise, her unhinged manager takes her prisoner and forces her to write a new novel during the holidays.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Cari Farver
programme.desc: Based on actual events. When his girlfriend, Cari, starts sending him demanding messages Dave decides to break it off. Shortly after, Cari disappears and the police make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's handsome son, but when she witnesses a murder, the couple must go on the run to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Engaged to be Murdered
programme.desc: Amanda will stop at nothing to keep her son Jackson from marrying Olivia, who she believes is after his money.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: The true story of Britney Jean Spears, one of the bestselling teenage music artists of all-time, whose dating life and public emotional breakdowns were the subjects of a worldwide media frenzy.

programme.title: Burned By Love
programme.desc: A divorcee meets her seemingly perfect match on an online dating site, only to discover he's a scammer who's looking to destroy her life.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: Decades after they were frozen, Abe, JFK, Joan, and Cleo are suddenly thrust into 2023. While JFK courts Joan, Abe attempts to impress his crush - but they find it difficult to navigate societal norms.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: Attempting to repress her feelings for Abe, Joan finds solace in Harriet and Frida, who may be hiding secrets of their own. Meanwhile, Confucius teaches JFK about the internet.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: As Candide's manufactured crisis wreaks havoc, Joan begins to doubt her relationship with JFK, Abe turns to Frida for advice, and Harriet frets over a future as a #winemom.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.sub-title: The Crown: Joancoming: It's A Cleo Cleo Cleo Cleo World
programme.desc: When a rumour derails Cleo's bid for homecoming queen, Joan is forced to reconsider their lifelong rivalry for the sake of the school ... and the world.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: Hoping to land a role on hit show Tropical Hospital, Harriet stages her new musical but must contend with Joan's creative meddling.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: When a fire threatens to shut down to Grassy Knoll, a desperate Abe spearheads a campaign to rebuild the town's beloved greasy diner - and save Joan.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: After the clones find themselves stranded in the desert, JFK experiences a heat-induced intellectual breakthrough, Abe faces a zombie horde, and Scudworth and Mr B hit the big-time in Vegas.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: While Clone High mourns a power couple breakup, Candide and Scudworth hatch a plan to reunite the pair with mandatory sex education, swarthy seamen, and some sensual sax solos.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: After a figh with Scudworth, Mr B prepares to leave Clone High for good - but not before telling Joan his epic back story.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: As Operation Spread Eagle ends, the students of Clone High are offered the opportunity to attend Clone High College. But when the entrance exam proves deadly, Joan must fend for herself.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: Joan returns from summer break a social pariah. Harriet teams up with Toussaint Louverture to take down a suspicious new science teacher.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.sub-title: Don't You Get It? Sports Are Huge In This Town
programme.desc: Scudworth takes Frida under his wing, causing the would-be artist to consider a more lucrative career in competitive snorkelling.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.sub-title: Bible Humpers: A Much Needed Praycation
programme.desc: While Scudworth seeks to make Clone High a tax-exempt religious school, JFK's new relationship with God threatens his friendship with Abe.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.sub-title: The Principal Principle: Sub Zero To Sub Hero
programme.desc: When Scudworth makes Joan principal for the day, she throws a redemption-worthy rager alongside a reluctant Abe.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.sub-title: Money Can Buy Me Love: Stupid Is As Cupid Does
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day nears, Confucius and Joan con Harriet into thinking they're a couple. Meanwhile, Scudworth swoons over an old nemesis.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.sub-title: Go Yell It On The Mountain: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Tensions mount on a ski trip to Avalanche Mountain, threatening love triangles, bromances and Mr B's sanity.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: After falling for mysterious manic pixie dream girl Mary, Abe risks life and limb to shed his status as Clone High's resident virgin.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: When Scudworth hatches a plan to extort Confucius' absentee foster parents for money, Confucius must convince his feuding friends to fill in.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: After breaking into Scudworth's office, the clones discover a sordid tale of rival theme parks, romance and revenge within the pages of his diary.

programme.title: Fashion Destination: Maldives
programme.desc: Discover Maldives which offers spellbinding sceneries, vibrant culture, pristine beaches, and fascinating landmarks! Apart from idyllic locations with powdery white sands, it is also famous for water sports and other adventure activities.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner - his mum!

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers and rewards those who show kindness.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Allie makes a daring decision, and Nathan and Elizabeth rush to intervene. Uncovered memories shift Lucas's plans. Faith takes a big step. Mei cooks for Hickam's family.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.sub-title: What God wants to do through me to make a difference
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe. A blend of flying, exploring, construction and renovations, camp life, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Love is the answer to all the world's problems. Learn how trusting God and loving people can bring you great rewards.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Testament: The Parables Retold
programme.desc: Luke hides from the Temple Guard with the early disciples, hoping to further his research on Jesus. But he gets more than he bargained for when he hears the storyteller's own stories; the parables.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: Scotland is eager for their running celebrity to bring home gold in the 100-meter sprint at the 1924 Olympics. But when Eric declares he won't race on a Sunday he is labeled a disgrace and a traitor.

programme.title: Ancestors: Old Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the Old Testament. These animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Transformation Begins with the Call to Conversion (1)
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Just As I Am: A Journey of Faith and Redemption - Charlotte Elliot
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: The Happy Camper
programme.desc: When Dillon's love life falls apart she returns to her grandfather's farm in Colorado, where she works with Jordan, a handsome hardware store owner, to restore a vintage 1960s caravan, and along the way, finds new love.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: With the rodeo in town, Gary Travis leads a new attempt to unmask the criminals and serve justice.

programme.title: Greater
programme.desc: Explores ways that Jesus leads people into freedom; from instant life changing God encounters, to transformation that takes places over years. Uncover practical steps towards inner freedom.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Life Hacks: Pocket tips from the Book of Proverbs Pt8
programme.desc: Marc explores the wisdom of the Book of Proverbs looking at the wisdom that God has provided, so that we can observe it and put it into practice in our day to day lives.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Out By Faith And Win Pt 3 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Love is the answer to all the world's problems. Learn how trusting God and loving people can bring you great rewards.

programme.title: The Happy Camper
programme.desc: When Dillon's love life falls apart she returns to her grandfather's farm in Colorado, where she works with Jordan, a handsome hardware store owner, to restore a vintage 1960s caravan, and along the way, finds new love.

programme.title: The Grief Journey
programme.desc: The Grief Journey centres around a diverse group of individuals who are brought together by their mutual desire to heal. Each member of the class has experienced a profound loss and each individual's story parallels the parables of Jesus.

programme.title: 500: The Impact of the Reformation Today
programme.desc: A lone monk's actions 500 years ago continue to have a great impact. Renowned Luther scholars from around the world reveal how the Reformation surrounds us more than we realise through religion, politics, and our society.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Marriages should be built on the foundations taught in the Bible. Matthew 19. (San Antonio 1970.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.sub-title: The World Outside Your Window Pt-3
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, life-changing, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus in a practical way.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Out By Faith And Win Pt 3 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible.

programme.title: Burned By Love
programme.desc: A divorcee meets her seemingly perfect match on an online dating site, only to discover he's a scammer who's looking to destroy her life.

programme.title: Single Black Female 2
programme.desc: Three years after narrowly escaping the murderous clutches of her half-sister Simone, Monica is ready for a fresh start in Seattle as host of the city's number one prime-time investigative program.

programme.title: Murder in Nashville
programme.desc: A woman gets swept up in a whirlwind romance with the son of a wealthy power player in the country music scene.

programme.title: Abducted at an HBCU
programme.desc: College counsellor Ellen becomes concerned when Shannon, a student who's struggling financially, suddenly stops going to classes.

programme.title: Dying to Win
programme.desc: A gymnast gets caught in a web of lies when her mother and stepfather are found murdered in the family home.

programme.title: Trapped in Her Dorm Room
programme.desc: College student Erin becomes trapped in her dorm room during Spring Break when a classmate's harmless adoration turns into a dangerous obsession.

programme.title: Murder at the Derby
programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job at a prestigious horse stable under Jennifer's mentorship, but tensions rise when Jennifer's jealous brother puts everyone's lives at risk.

programme.title: Framed by My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge.

programme.title: Betrayed By Love
programme.desc: Carrie becomes distraught when a car accident takes her sister Riley's life. As the investigation commences, she discovers that the accident might not be the true cause of Riley's death.

programme.title: Sins of My Husband
programme.desc: After police kill serial killer Tony Dandridge, his wife, Katherine, denies knowledge of his crimes. But when a victim's mother supports Katherine, it turns into a dangerous game of truth and lies.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: A woman stumbles into the middle of a kidnapping while stranded at a small-town airport on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Girl in Room 13
programme.desc: Grace becomes addicted to opioids after suffering a sports injury. She's ready to leave her addiction behind under her mother's watch, but Richie kidnaps her to sell her into human trafficking.

programme.title: House of Deadly Lies
programme.desc: A stay at home mother takes in her struggling best friend to help her through a tough time, but soon secrets are revealed that could break her family apart and put everyone in danger.

programme.title: Hoax: The Kidnapping of Sherri Papini
programme.desc: In 2016, Sherri Papini goes for a run and doesn't come home. This Northern California missing person case becomes a national story when she returns and her story about being abducted doesn't add up.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: A pastor's wife seeks solace from her marital woes by having an affair with a pool boy. The fling quickly upsets the idyllic facade of the community, reigniting old jealousies.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, is caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him after a prison escape.

programme.desc: A new client asks Dave to imagine if the Hummer H2 continued to be produced, and to build what he envisions that car might look like 20 years into the future.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: To celebrate their 100th car Mike and Edd restore a Darracq Type L. They must be ready in time to face the London to Brighton Run.

programme.title: Street Outlaws
programme.desc: Oklahoma City's fastest take on the trash-talking street racers from Chicago. When many of the races get rained out, both sides agree to a rematch in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: After falling for mysterious manic pixie dream girl Mary, Abe risks life and limb to shed his status as Clone High's resident virgin.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: When Scudworth hatches a plan to extort Confucius' absentee foster parents for money, Confucius must convince his feuding friends to fill in.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: After breaking into Scudworth's office, the clones discover a sordid tale of rival theme parks, romance and revenge within the pages of his diary.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.sub-title: The Cloniest Place On Earth: Missile While You Work
programme.desc: Candide's solution to Scudworth's Cloney Island problem leaves the future of Clone High up in the air.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: As Gizmo is torn from his home and captured by a miserable circus, sheltered 10-year-old Sam Wing's retired treasure-hunting grandpa introduces him to a whole new world of magic.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: With Gizmo's newest batch on the loose, Sam is torn between his promise of keeping Mogwai safe or returning to his normal life, a choice that is complicated by an alliance with street thief Elle.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: All aboard! The trust between Sam, Elle, and Gizmo is tested by a hungry supernatural stranger on a train.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: When a raging storm forces her, Sam, and Gizmo to seek shelter, Elle struggles to hide her past from her friends and a too-friendly innkeeper.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Sam, Elle, and Gizmo's nerve are tested as they follow Grandpa's map through the scariest woods they've ever encountered where more than soul-sucking, undead bureaucrats lurk in the darkness.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.sub-title: Always Buy A God A Drink First
programme.desc: Upon arriving at the vibrant and bizarre Spirit Market, Sam and Elle must convince Gizmo's marker that not all humans are bad an argument complicated by Riley Greene's hot pursuit.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: It's a race against the clock as Sam, Elle, and Gizmo battle fearsome - yet adorable - monsters on their way to the Valley of Jade as long as Greene and the Gremlins don't catch up with them first.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: The friends celebrate their arrival at the Valley of Jade, but will Sam finally gain the confidence he desperatley needs?

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Devastated by failure, Sam and Elle must look forward to find the strength to protect Shanghai from being overrun with violent Gremlins.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.sub-title: Never Ever Expose Them To Bright Light
programme.desc: With our heroes reunited, their bond is put to a final test as enemies from all sides converge.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: The Wing family is back in adventure mode after Sam discovers new evidence of Mogwai related problems, and Gizmo starts to act different.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Magic has dropped our heroes short of their San Francisco destination, so now they must escape a notorious prison and its unusual guards.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Upon reaching San Francisco's Chinatown, our heroes, and their newfound prison buddy Chang, discover its criminal underworld has been taken over by an old acquaintance.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Sam and Chang recruit help to rescue Gizmo from Noggin's Evil Mogwai gang, while Elle discovers that her mother is alive but facing her own magical problem.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.sub-title: There's Always A Fortune In The Cookie Factory
programme.desc: It's the battle for Chinatown. But will Chang and Chinatown's residents ultimately choose to side with our heroes?

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.sub-title: Never Get Out Of The Truck
programme.desc: Our heroes journey west to free Elle's mother, but first must free themselves from a haunted old mansion.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Still on their western quest, our heroes are recruited to help an unusual town with their own supernatural problem: nightly hauntings by a legendary ghost.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: To reach their destination, our heroes pass through the resting place for all the west's wildest tall tales and legends. However, its temptations might finally unleash Gizmo's inner Evil Mogwai.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: As they make a treacherous journey into a mysterious desert tomb, Sam and Elle must choose between saving Elle's mother or heeding Grandpa's warning, all while Gizmo's gone missing.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Our heroes must find a way to reunite if they want any hope of defeating a massive, monstrous force, before it destroys America.

programme.title: Fashion Destination: Indonesia
programme.desc: Explore Indonesia, the country famous for a myriad of gorgeous islands and beaches, rich biodiversity, and cultural heritage! It is one of the world's most popular places for surfing and yoga retreats.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: How to Redeem Your Family Name Series Part 2
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: None of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd Part 2
programme.desc: In part two of The Lord Is My Shepherd, Pastor Bayless looks at the peace and restoration Jesus promises His sheep.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Every time Jesus performed a miracle, He revealed the Father's goodness to us!

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A daily program with news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, including powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: The love you have to give can be life-changing! Discover the difference you can make by trusting God and loving people.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Will of God in Your Life/The Courage to Face Life's Trials
programme.desc: Tackling important issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: The Happy Camper
programme.desc: When Dillon's love life falls apart she returns to her grandfather's farm in Colorado, where she works with Jordan, a handsome hardware store owner, to restore a vintage 1960s caravan, and along the way, finds new love.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Good Guys Doing Good
programme.desc: Host Tim Bisagno sets out on a journey across the USA to find men of God serving the Lord in adventurous, exciting and unique ways. Follow Tim as he travels, participates, laughs, cries, honours and showcases Good Guys.

programme.title: Miraculous Victories of Israel
programme.desc: What happens when the God of Israel intervenes in the battles of His people? Miraculous victories occur - victories that are sometimes inexplicable and often unbelievable.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: Judah - David's Training Ground of Faith
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Positioned In His Protection Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: The Living Waters team takes the gospel to London during the Coronation of King Charles.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: The love you have to give can be life-changing! Discover the difference you can make by trusting God and loving people.

programme.title: War Room
programme.desc: The Jordan's are a middle-class couple who seemingly have it all. In reality, their marriage is a war zone. Elizabeth discovers she can start fighting for her family instead of against them.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.sub-title: The Holy Spirit Your Best Friend
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Will of God in Your Life/The Courage to Face Life's Trials
programme.desc: Tackling important issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK theologian, Cambridge scholar, pastor and Bible teacher, David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: North to Home
programme.desc: Suzanne McBride and her three adopted daughters. This looks like a great time for family reunion, but the sisters are wrestling with unique challenges that threaten to derail this special occasion.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Positioned In His Protection Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Night Owls & Early Birds
programme.sub-title: God's Love for us is Endless
programme.desc: Join Hoot, Savannah, Screech, Charlie, and Steve as they take a deeper dive into the truths found in God's Word.

programme.title: The Garden
programme.sub-title: The Truth is the Mane Thing
programme.desc: Lenny Lion and Lucy Lamb are the caretakers for a magical garden where anything can grow. They work for The Boss (God) who gives them a new assignment to complete in every episode.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, is caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him after a prison escape.

programme.title: Single Black Female 3: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Monica is proven innocent after being wrongfully arrested for murder. As charges are dropped, the police shift focus to Simone, who has vanished while bonding with her daughter Joy.

programme.title: Cyberstalker
programme.desc: An online stalker torments a young woman.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: Boy In The Attic
programme.desc: A teen girl falls in love with the boy who's been hiding in the attic of her family's new home. When she learns that he's been accused of murder, she must make a tough decision.

programme.title: The Bear Lake Murders
programme.desc: A sheriff teams up with a detective to uncover the truth behind a series of annual deaths in a resort town. Their investigation leads them to believe that a killer is preying on holidaymakers.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a boat to Canada, but when it sinks, she's rescued by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she heals, Jess realises she's fallen into another trap.

programme.title: A Lifeguard's Obsession
programme.desc: When a lonely, awkward lifeguard saves a well-known woman from drowning, he believes he's earned a place in her life and in her heart.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend from college working aboard a luxury yacht in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Trapped in the Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: Lured into an unwelcome reunion at a vacant ski lodge, former college friends find themselves in a fight for their lives when they become the target of an unseen adversary.

programme.title: My Landlord Wants Me Dead
programme.desc: A college dropout unwittingly puts her own life at stake when she investigates a series of strange and terrifying events at her aunt's secluded ranch house.

programme.title: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: After the death of their father, the four Dollanganger children are convinced by their mother to stay hidden in the attic of their grandparents' mansion so she can reclaim the family fortune.

programme.title: How She Caught a Killer
programme.desc: Inspired by the real story of a female detective who went undercover to catch The Route 40 Killer.

programme.title: Love Triangle Nightmare
programme.desc: Brittany meets a stranger who has everything she wants in a partner and despite being an unknown man as warned by others, she falls in love with him which leads to something tragic.

programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: A woman's world comes crashing down when another woman shows up at her doorstep claiming she's married to her husband.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman

programme.sub-title: Let's Go To Ivo Tower, You Say

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.sub-title: You Will Believe A Man Can Lie

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: When Jimmy gets kidnapped, it's up to Lois and Clark to save him - but rescuing Jimmy will lead them into danger as they deal with mad scientists, military secrets, and relationship woes!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Clark tries to plan a normal date without any Superman problems - but gets interrupted when Mr. Mxyzptlk sweeps him, Jimmy, and Lois into a high-stakes, multiverse-hopping chase!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois meets her journalism idol, Vicki Vale - only for Vicki to make Lois question her loyalty to Superman. Meanwhile, Superman hunts down Task Force X while dealing with a new power!

programme.desc: Superman gets answers to who he is and where he came from, while coming face-to-face with The General, leader of Task Force X. Meanwhile, Lois and Jimmy must find Superman before Dr. Ivo destroys Metropolis!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman

programme.desc: Jimmy and Kara race back to Metropolis to stop Brainiac's invasion of Earth; Lois tries to free Clark from Brainiac's control, only to lose herself in an alternate reality.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Perry saddles Jimmy with a new team to run Flamebird; Clark and Lois investigate Stryker Penitentiary and discover how far Amanda Waller will go to rid the world of Superman.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Clark's life falls apart as The General goes into hiding in Clark's flat. Jimmy struggles with being a leader, and Lois goes toe-to-toe with Vicki Vale as they track down missing scientists.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Jimmy gets invited to the STAR Labs Symposium. Clark joins him for support, but Lex Luthor takes over; the General flees, and Lois chases after him.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois and Clark's relationship come to the breaking point when Superman receives the title of Metropolis' most eligible bachelor; Jimmy gives a girl a tour of the city.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman

programme.sub-title: Transformation Begins with the Call to Conversion (1)
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Positioned In His Protection Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: Two stories, told by the VeggieTales gang, talk about why it's important to love your neighbour.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.sub-title: God And His People In The Wilderness
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: Dying For A Crown
programme.desc: A new student at a high school stops at nothing to gain popularity and become homecoming queen at the prom.

programme.title: I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: Rising from humble beginnings and overcoming personal challenges, singer Gloria Gaynor soars to the top of the music charts with her legendary hit, I Will Survive.

programme.title: If There Be Thorns
programme.desc: With Christopher and Cathy Dollanganger living together as man and wife, Cathy's two sons are unaware of the incestuous nature of their parents' relationship.

programme.title: How to Live Your Best Death
programme.desc: Hoping to go after her dreams, Kristin hires Ashley, a life coach who promises to help her reach her full potential. However, things take a turn when unconventional methods start to wreak havoc,

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: Who Is Killing The Cheerleaders?
programme.desc: Ellie, a former cheerleader, returns to her high school as a teacher 10 years after she was nearly killed in a series of brutal slayings on the squad.

programme.title: Surviving The Sleepover
programme.desc: Outspoken teenager Hannah goes to a sleepover at a popular girl's house, not realising she was only invited to be the victim of a prank.

programme.title: The Girl Who Wasn't Dead
programme.desc: When 15-year-old Erica vanishes without a trace, authorities believe she may have been the victim of a serial killer.

programme.title: My Father's Murder in Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a celebratory trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George is murdered. Allie must uncover family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange as his fascination with her turns into obsession.

programme.title: Abducted on Prom Night
programme.desc: Against her better judgement, a mother allows her troubled daughter to attend prom, but the night turns into a twisted game of cat-and-mouse as the daughter and her friends are taken hostage.

programme.title: Let's Get Physical
programme.desc: A fitness instructor leads a double life, running a prostitution ring with a client list. Sadie receives an anonymous tip and soon after her studio is raided by authorities.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: After her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard on a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to life and more deaths occur.

programme.title: Cheerleader Nightmare
programme.desc: When her cheating boyfriend is accused of murdering the head cheerleader, Sophie becomes involved in a race to discover the truth before it's too late.

programme.title: Am I A Serial Killer?
programme.desc: A teenage girl visits her mum on death row and gets lured into a dangerous trap to take the fall for her mother's crimes.
